title: Just A Laminate
description: Down with rugs, long live laminate!
body:
When I first logged into Minecraft on version 1.5.2 and saw pressure plates in the creative inventory, I thought they were some kind of "wooden mats", and I was very upset when I realized that they were pressure plate that did not completely cover the blocks... That's why I decided to make a mod that adds these "wooden rugs" or, to be more precise, laminate.
   Laminate is crafted from wooden slabs in a ratio of 1:2, it can be used as fuel. Unlike ordinary weak rugs, laminate is not washed off with water and has greater fire resistance and durability
